TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: qqway ryax maku' mqyanux qani ga, kya nanak soni' minxal saku' mita' kinqruzyux iyal qqway nani. laxi tcingi na qqway qu pyatu'! pkkisit su' lma. . qinzyuqan maku' kwara' ngabih ru qqway la. . cyux nya' stpaq rhzyal qu qqway nya'. . ha, nanu'?! ssaki' su' mami' qu qqway qani? nyux su' ini' knguciq ga! Śēä,
S.PHON: qqwaj rjax maku Ē mqjanux qani …£a, kja nanak s~…ēoni Ē minxal s~…ēaku Ē mita Ē kinqruzjux ijal qqwaj nani. laxi t ¶~ ®iŇči na qqwaj qu pjatu Ē! pkkis~…ēit s~…ēu Ē lma. . qinzjuqan maku Ē kwara Ē Ňčaő≤ińß ru qqwaj la. . ¶~ ®jux nja Ē s~…ētpaq rńßzjal qu qqwaj nja Ē. . ńßa, nanu Ē?! s~…ēs~…ēaki Ē s~…ēu Ē mami Ē qu qqwaj qani? njux s~…ēu Ē ini Ē kŇču ¶~ ®iq …£a! *,
S.FORM: qqway ryax maku' mqyanux qani ga, kya nanak soni' minxal saku' mita' kinqruzyux iyal qqway nani. laxi tcingi na qqway qu pyatu'! pkkisit su' lma. . qinzyuqan maku' kwara' ngabih ru qqway la. . cyux nya' stpaq rhzyal qu qqway nya'. . ha, nanu'?! ssaki' su' mami' qu qqway qani? nyux su' ini' knguciq ga!
